sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint says the worker pulls or receives an asset but does not state whether signed provider URLs can be persisted.
decisionTaken: Provider URLs and signed URLs are adapter-only and forbidden in job, assessment, settlement, storage, DocumentReference, and projection records.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: It matches the Phase 2 rule that raw provider payloads and sensitive provider details cannot escape the adapter boundary.
operationalRisk: Operational debugging must use provider refs and correlation refs rather than direct URL replay.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: If provider support requires URL tracing, store a redacted adapter-local audit ref rather than the URL.
